label: Other female genital
quick_take: This aggregate includes vulva, vagina, and ovary. Most of the signal is ovarian. The really striking finding is the set of **U-shapes in East Asian women** — Japan Miyagi, Qidong, Hawaii Chinese, Trivandrum, Singapore Indian — all showing a dip at vol II–IX then a pronounced climb. Inland China rising fast (Jiashan, Qidong); Hawaii and LA Chinese women falling from historical highs.

findings.title: Japan Miyagi women, U-shape
findings.text: 2.46 (vol I) → 2.17 (vol II) → 10.75 (vol XII). Biggest %-change at +337 %. The fall-then-rise is consistent with under-ascertainment + genuine reversal, not coding artefact (other Japanese cancers show the same shape).
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Japan Miyagi women, U-shape

findings.title: Hawaii Chinese / LA Chinese women: deep U-shape
findings.text: Hawaii Chinese peaked 16.18 (vol II) → 4.04 (vol XI) → 7.27 (vol XII). LA Chinese 13.64 (vol IV) → 6.82 (vol XII). 50 % fall with a weak rebound.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Hawaii Chinese / LA Chinese women: deep U-shape

findings.title: India Trivandrum: 19.50 (vol VII) → 5.10 (vol VIII) → 7.95 (vol XII)
findings.text: As with other sites in this registry, the vol VII → VIII cliff is likely a scope change, not biology.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — India Trivandrum: 19.50 (vol VII) → 5.10 (vol VIII) → 7.95 (vol XII)

findings.title: Inland China rising
findings.text: Qidong 1.64 → 5.09 (+210 %), Jiashan 2.58 → 6.83 (+165 %). Worth looking separately at ovary vs vulva within this group.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Inland China rising

findings.title: Poland Cracow inverted-U peaking vol IX at 16.44
findings.text: consistent with other Polish cancer peaks in the 1990s and the subsequent slower decline.
findings.image_alt: CI5 trend chart — Poland Cracow inverted-U peaking vol IX at 16.44

findings.text: Aggregate site — the sub-components (ovary vs vulva vs vagina) have very different risk profiles. Any finding here must be re-investigated at the sub-site level to be publishable.
India Trivandrum vol VII–VIII step is almost certainly a registry coding issue.
Japan's U-shape for this aggregate mirrors breast, colon, corpus — this "Japanese cancer transition" across five female sites is a coherent story that deserves one chart.
Decompose the outliers into ovary / vulva / vagina using the sub-site version (C56 / C51-52 / C57) — the Pacific-peoples and inland-China signals likely differ.
